name: Fruit and Shrimp Salad- Yam Polamai
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Assorted fruits, sliced into bite-sized pieces (e.g., pomelo, grapes, apple, pear)
1 Fresh Red Chili, seeded and finely shredded
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the assorted fruits into bite-sized pieces. For pomelo, peel individual sections and break them apart into grains about the size of a grape seed. If using grapes, split and seed them. Toss apple or pear slices with a little citrus juice to prevent oxidation.
2. In a small skillet or saucepan, heat oil over low heat. Gently fry shallot and garlic until lightly browned. Remove from heat and drain on paper towels.
3. In a medium bowl, combine lime juice, salt, and sugar (if used). Stir to dissolve. Add the fruits, shrimp, and half of the fried shallot and garlic, then toss to coat evenly with the dressing. Taste and adjust seasoning if necessary.
4. Transfer the salad to a serving dish and garnish with remaining fried shallot and garlic, toasted peanuts, and chili.
Serves 4 with other dishes.
Variation: Use cooked shredded chicken or pork in place of shrimp.
